summary.current_primary: Stage71 retry2 Stage57+Stage66 bridge-enabled frozen recovery
summary.main_conclusion: Do not proceed to broad implementation. Stage107 locks ContraMamba-vNext as an entitlement-first state-space epistemic judgment controller and defers implementation to Stage108+ after static audit.
summary.vnext_target: ContraMamba-vNext as a state-space epistemic judgment controller, not a flat 3-way verifier.
summary.core_bottleneck: Final entitlement/routing cannot safely recover latent SUPPORT signal without external tuning.
summary.stage108_next: static repo audit for v7/vNext salvage before any code patch
do_not_do_next: Do not add more synthetic bridge data.
Do not tune thresholds on VitaminC.
Do not build RAG or hallucination controller in one stage.
Do not patch architecture before static repo audit.

current_primary.name: Stage71 retry2 Stage57+Stage66 bridge-enabled frozen recovery
current_primary.reason: All later bridge and threshold branches failed promotion criteria. Stage71 remains the valid primary while vNext is scoped.

closed_evidence.summary: Synthetic bridge append branches can improve REFUTE recall or external macro-F1, but repeatedly suppress SUPPORT entitlement.
closed_evidence.implication_for_vnext: Do not continue bridge-append search as the main mechanism.

closed_evidence.summary: External-label threshold sweep found recoverable latent SUPPORT signal in Stage92C probabilities.
closed_evidence.implication_for_vnext: Representation contains useful signal, but external-tuned thresholds are not promotable.

closed_evidence.summary: Clean-dev already has perfect SUPPORT/REFUTE recall, so clean-only threshold selection becomes underdetermined. No strict nontrivial clean-safe threshold candidate was found.
closed_evidence.implication_for_vnext: Final routing must be structurally redesigned; threshold-only transfer is insufficient.

closed_evidence.summary: Clean-derived portable delta slightly improves Stage92C but remains below Stage73 on SUPPORT recall.
closed_evidence.implication_for_vnext: Do not promote threshold branch; use as design motivation only.

vnext_bottlenecks.description: The model can carry SUPPORT signal in probabilities, but final routing fails to safely recover it without external-label tuning.
vnext_bottlenecks.required_fix: Entitlement-first hierarchical routing rather than flat 3-way final softmax.

vnext_bottlenecks.description: NOT_ENTITLED currently acts as one class covering frame mismatch, predicate absence, insufficiency, ambiguity, and novelty.
vnext_bottlenecks.required_fix: Decompose not-entitled reasons into explicit intermediate states.

vnext_bottlenecks.description: Small synthetic data interventions shift global SUPPORT/REFUTE/NE balance rather than selectively fixing errors.
vnext_bottlenecks.required_fix: Mechanism-level constraints and routing structure before further data append.

vnext_bottlenecks.description: Clean-dev is too easy for SUPPORT/REFUTE and cannot select robust thresholds.
vnext_bottlenecks.required_fix: Use clean-dev preservation as a gate, not as the sole design signal.

vnext_scope.target_identity: ContraMamba-vNext as a state-space epistemic judgment controller, not a flat 3-way verifier.
vnext_scope.primary_goal: Model judgment entitlement before truth polarity, then route to SUPPORT/REFUTE/NOT_ENTITLED or future action states.
vnext_scope.architecture_principle: SUPPORT and REFUTE should be high only when entitlement is high. NOT_ENTITLED should not merely be the residual class of low polarity.

stage107_in_scope: Summarize Stage71-106 failure evidence into vNext requirements.
Lock vNext architectural identity and output schema direction.
Define module order: Frame → Predicate → Sufficiency/Entitlement → Polarity → Final routing.
Define what is explicitly out of scope for the next implementation patch.
Define Stage108-112 sequence before any coding or training.

vnext_loss_direction.status: keep but demote from sole objective

vnext_loss_direction.purpose: Prevent SUPPORT/REFUTE when frame/predicate/sufficiency states are invalid.
Polarity should matter only after entitlement is established.
Separate entitled SUPPORT/REFUTE from non-entitled states without global SUPPORT suppression.

promotion_criteria_direction.description: Must preserve clean-dev before any external diagnostic.
No top-line promotion if SUPPORT recall collapses.
REFUTE gain cannot come solely by over-suppressing SUPPORT.
False NOT_ENTITLED on entitled examples must be tracked separately.
External labels can diagnose but not tune or select deployable thresholds.

next_stage_plan.name: static repo audit for v7/vNext salvage
next_stage_plan.goal: Inspect existing v7_hierarchical / modeling files / runner flags / output export paths. Decide salvage vs new vNext file.
next_stage_plan.forbidden: training, smoke run, external eval, dataset generation

next_stage_plan.name: minimal vNext architecture patch
next_stage_plan.goal: Implement or salvage minimal entitlement-first logit composition. No new benchmark and no run commands inside agent prompt.
next_stage_plan.forbidden: full training, external eval, bridge append

next_stage_plan.name: plumbing validation
next_stage_plan.goal: Check imports/help/config compatibility after Stage109 patch.

next_stage_plan.name: clean-dev preservation run
next_stage_plan.goal: Run main clean train/dev only after plumbing is valid.
next_stage_plan.forbidden: external diagnostic until clean gate passes

next_stage_plan.name: external diagnostic
next_stage_plan.goal: Apply external/VitaminC diagnostic only if Stage111 clean preservation passes.
next_stage_plan.forbidden: external tuning or threshold selection for promotion
